## Source: ossf-package-analysis (8fb5fd24604e319bf0fd432162579d9b9ffa30c7eb829de263bccf4f7a04d58b)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-features-featureflaghub' @ 1.5.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
